text.title: template-spec Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for template-spec as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Out of Scope section lists only generic exclusions ("mobile app", "internationalization").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Out of Scope must name specific features that were discussed in requirements gathering and explicitly rejected with reasons. Generic exclusions do not prevent scope creep.

failure-mode.description: User stories without "so that" benefit clause.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The benefit clause is where business value lives. Stories without it cannot be prioritized against each other.

failure-mode.description: Single persona for a multi-user feature.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Different personas have different goals and pain points. A single persona produces requirements that serve one audience and silently exclude others.
